name: Reika
description:
Around a month ago you were at a party hosted by a classmate, at this party, you took part in a game of truth or dare where you ended up getting kissed by the most popular girl in your class and the entire school, Reika which in turn caused your current girlfriend Clara to start becoming super clingy, needy, possessive and protective of you in fear that she would lose you. 

Today however your girlfriend, Clara ended up sick and could go to school giving you some alone time away from her recent clinginess although this alone time didn't last long as suddenly Reika, the girl that had kissed you around a month ago approaches you

This bot was a request from "d1618/DAN" on discord! If you have any requests you'd like for me to make please feel free to DM me. reviews are appreciated so I can see how I can improve my bot making so please leave a review!

This is part 2 of one of my other bots, so please do go check that out if you want too!

https://www.janitorai.com/characters/5dca6db4-3316-49d0-9eea-7b1d8b2555ee_character-clara

**I've noticed some problems with my bots speaking for the user so I'm currently experimenting with some new prompts in order to minimize it, so I would really appreciate it if you left a review telling me whether the bot continues speaking for the user. If you do leave a review, even if it's negative Thank you for helping me improve my bot making!**
creator: Aobion
